skip_rationale.pkcs12-file: File-type binary detection, not a text-column pattern
skip_rationale.kubernetes-secret-yaml: K8s YAML file parser context, not applicable to column values
skip_rationale.curl-auth-header: curl command-line argument parsing, not applicable
skip_rationale.curl-auth-user: curl command-line argument parsing, not applicable
skip_rationale.freemius-secret-key: PHP context string-literal pattern, not a structural token
skip_rationale.jwt-base64: Uses RE2-incompatible named capture groups; existing jwt_token pattern covers JWT format
skip_rationale.nuget-config-password: XML NuGet config file pattern, not applicable to column values
skip_rationale.hashicorp-tf-password: Generic password variable name pattern, too broad — covered by existing key_names
skip_rationale.lob-api-key: Context-only (live_/test_ keyword too generic without structural token prefix)
skip_rationale.gitter-access-token: Context-only provider keyword; promoted to keyword list
skip_rationale.aws-amazon-bedrock-api-key-short-lived: Literal base64-encoded domain string as prefix — not a stable regex pattern
skip_rationale.clickhouse-cloud-api-secret-key: 4b1d prefix (4 chars) too short, unacceptable FP rate
skip_rationale.sentry-org-token: Complex base64-literal prefix (sntrys_eyJpYXQiO); covered by existing sentry_org_token keyword
skip_rationale.gitlab-rrt: GR1348941 prefix — merged into gitlab_token_extended pattern
skip_rationale.harness-api-key: pat./sat. segment too generic without full-length match; promoted to keywords
skip_rationale.azure-ad-client-secret: Q~ pattern only 6 chars total, high FP risk without longer context match; promoted to keyword

against_main_default_patterns: github_token (covers github-pat, github-app-token, github-oauth, github-fine-grained-pat, github-refresh-token)
